---
title: "Online Workshop: Practices for Securing Scholarly Blogs"
author:
- name: Catharina Ochsner
  url: https://infomgnt.org/members/Catharina_Ochsner/
  orcid: 0009-0005-3885-3951
  affiliation: Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin, Berlin School of Library and Information Science
  affiliation-url: https://www.hu-berlin.de/de 
- name: Heinz Pampel
  url: https://infomgnt.org/members/Heinz_Pampel/
  orcid: 0000-0003-3334-2771
  affiliation: Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin, Berlin School of Library and Information Science
  affiliation-url: https://www.hu-berlin.de/de 
date: "2026-04-28"
categories: [Lab Life, Research]
citation:
  url: https://infomgnt.org/posts/2026-04-28-online-workshop-practices-for-securing-scholarly-blogs/
image: IFW_praktiken.jpg
---

![[Foto](https://unsplash.com/de/fotos/ein-haufen-holzklotze-mit-dem-wort-blog-cfE5i6sHCFA) von [Nadiia Ganzhyi](https://unsplash.com/de/@nadiiag) auf [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/).](IFW_praktiken.jpg)

**Date:** Friday, May 29 2026

**Time:** 10:00 - 11:30 Uhr

**Place:** Online via Zoom

As part of the [Infra Wiss Blogs](https://infrawissblogs.org/) project, funded by the [German Research Foundation (DFG)](https://www.dfg.de/), we at the research group [Information Management](https://www.ibi.hu-berlin.de/de/forschung/infomanagement) at the [Berlin School of Library and Information Science](https://www.ibi.hu-berlin.de/de/forschung/infomanagement) at [Humboldt Universität zu Berlin](https://www.hu-berlin.de/) are developing solutions to ensure the long-term digital accessibility of scholarly blogs. Together with stakeholders from information infrastructure organizations, we are developing viable approaches and standards for the sustainable management of scholarly

As part of the project, we are organizing an online workshop on the digital preservation and accessibility of scholarly blogs. The goal is to bring together experts from various information infrastructure institutions to present existing procedures and discuss them collaboratively. You can register for the workshop [here](https://hu-berlin.zoom-x.de/meeting/register/4LhhdSaOSmuhi2X3y9exJg): <https://hu-berlin.zoom-x.de/meeting/register/4LhhdSaOSmuhi2X3y9exJg>

The workshop will feature three ten-minute presentations from selected infrastructure organizations, in which they will describe their practices. A five-minute question-and-answer session will follow each presentation. This will be followed by a group discussion in the plenary session. The event will conclude with a summary and an overview of the results.

**Program:**

|  |  |
|----|----|
| **Time** | **Description** |
| 10:00 - 10:15 | Welcome and introduction to the project Infra Wiss Blogs |
| 10:15 - 10:30 | Practices at Fachinformationsdienst for International and Interdisciplinary Legal Research by Ivo Vogel und Nihal Ariz |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Practices at Fachinformationsdienst Political Science by Regina Pfeifenberger and Michael Czolkoß-Hettwer  |
| 10:45 - 11:00 | Practices at Deutsches Literaturarchiv Marbach by Jochen Walter |
| 11:00 - 11:20 | Discussion |
| 11:20 - 11:30 | Summary of the results  |

The event will be held in German. Further details and updates on the workshop and the project Infra Wiss Blogs will be communicated via the [project blog](https://infrawissblogs.org/) as well as the project’s [mailing list](https://infrawissblogs.org/). If you have any questions, please contact Catharina Ochsner via [catharina.ochsner\@hu-berlin.de](mailto:catharina.ochsner@hu-berlin.de).

Further information about the research group can be found on our [official website](http://hu.berlin/infomgnt).

This text – excluding quotes and otherwise labelled parts – is licensed under the [CC BY 4.0 DEED](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.de).
